## Graduation Check
## Remaining Required Courses
*   CS 458: Advanced Programming in C# (3 cr)
*   CS 483: Senior Software Development Project (3 cr)
*   BCOM 231: Business Communication (3 cr) (Planned Spring 2027)
*   CS 365: Operating Systems (3 cr)
*   CS 379: Programming Languages and Compilers (3 cr)
*   CS 461: Artificial Intelligence (3 cr)
*   CS 478: Software Development (3 cr)
*   CIS 375: Systems Analysis and Design (3 cr)
*   BCOM 361: Business Career Planning and

Based on your current academic progress, Alex, graduating in Spring 2027 is not feasible.

Here's why:

*   **Total Credits:** By the end of Spring 2027, you will have accumulated approximately 47 credits (31 completed + 12 in-progress + 4 planned). A total of 120 credits are required for graduation.
*   **Core 39 Requirements:** You have significant outstanding requirements in the Core 39 curriculum, including:
    *   Foundations - Composition/Speech (3 credits)
    *   Ways of Knowing - Social Inquiry (3 credits)
    *   Ways of Knowing - Moral & Ethical Reasoning (3 credits)
    *   Ways of Knowing - Natural Sciences (4 credits)
    *   Ways of Knowing - Arts & Humanities (3 credits)
    *   BS Skills - Social Science (3 credits)
    *   BS Skills - Quantitative Reasoning (3 credits)
    *   Embedded Experience - Global (3 credits)
    *   Embedded Experience - Diversity (3 credits)
    *   Embedded Experience - Writing (6 credits)
    *   Macroeconomics (freshman/sophomore) (3 credits)
*   **Major Requirements:** While specific Computer Science Major, B.S. requirements are not detailed here, it is highly probable that many major-specific courses are still needed beyond your completed and in-progress coursework.

To plan for graduation, you will need to complete a substantial number of additional courses to fulfill both your Core 39 and major requirements. It is recommended to meet with an academic advisor to create a comprehensive degree plan.
